_comment: MISHKAN MCP template. /mishkan-init copies this to the project root as .mcp.json. Declares the cognee knowledge-graph MCP server. DEFAULT below = HTTP transport to the local cognee-mcp container on :7777 (run ~/.claude/mishkan/cognee/). For the zero-container stdio alternative, replace the cognee entry with the _stdio_alternative block: it launches cognee-mcp directly via uv (set the absolute path to a cloned cognee-mcp and LLM_API_KEY). Refs: https://docs.cognee.ai/cognee-mcp/mcp-local-setup
